---
title: "Statewide Crop Mapping GIS Geodatabase"
format: html
---


```{r}
    crop_mapping_delta <- here::here('data/')

    if(!dir.exists(out-dir)) [
        crops <- "https://data.cnra.ca.gov/dataset/6c3d65e3-35bb-49e1-a51e-49d5a2cf09a9/resource/157956a5-507e-4c6c-b161-b21361488576/download/i15_crop_mapping_2024_provisional_20251208.gdb.zip"

    download.file(url = )
    ]
```
